message:
test(proptest): add 18 property tests for runtime_telemetry coverage gaps

Expand proptest_runtime_telemetry from 27 to 45 tests (RT-28 through RT-45).

New coverage: RuntimePhase::is_terminal/is_shutting_down, HealthTier::
requires_attention/Display, FailureClass::is_retryable/Display,
UnifiedTelemetrySource serde, TelemetryLogSnapshot serde roundtrip,
TierTransitionRecord serde roundtrip, RuntimeTelemetryLogConfig serde,
builder detail_f64/detail_bool/failure(), count_category consistency,
disabled log behavior, ScopeTelemetryEmitter/CancellationTelemetryEmitter
event kind correctness, RuntimePhase Display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
